hindi: गणानां त्वा गणपतिं हवामहे कविं कवीनाम्।
english: O leader of the ganas, we invoke you, the poet of poets
roman: Gananam tva Ganapati havamahe kavim kavinam

hindi: ज्येष्ठराजं ब्रह्मणस्पत आ नः शृण्वन्नूतिभिः सीद सादनम्॥
english: The eldest king, Lord of Brahma — hearing us, be seated in your sanctuary
roman: Jyeshtha rajam Brahmanaspata a nah shrinvannuti bhih sida sadanam
Mahodara Vinayakashcha Vakra Tunda Maha bala

english: Ekadanta, four-armed, mouse-rider, fond of modak sweets
roman: Ekadantash chatur baahuh mushaka vahana modaka priya

english: Giver of powers, giver of wisdom, first to be worshipped, Ganeshwara
roman: Siddhi data Buddhi data prathama pujya Ganeshwara

english: Whoever reads the Ganesha Sahasranama Stotram with devotion
roman: Ganesha sahasranama stotram yah pathed bhaktitah

english: By the grace of Vignaraja attains all perfections
roman: Vighna raja prasadena sarva siddhi mavapnuyat
